caption: A group of individuals performs martial arts demonstrations in a large, upscale hall featuring high ceilings with recessed lighting and ornate chandeliers. A central performer wears a bright yellow traditional martial arts uniform and wields a long staff, moving dynamically through a series of strikes and stances. Other participants, dressed in blue uniforms, are also visible, some wielding staffs and moving in synchronization or separate routines. In the background, a seated audience watches the performance from tables. Throughout the sequence, the performer in yellow transitions from a standing position to a lunging stance, swinging the staff in wide arcs. The other performers shift their positions across the blue floor mat, with one person in blue moving toward the left and another transitioning their footwork on the right. The scene remains focused on the coordinated physical movements of the martial artists within the formal event space.
